# Algo Content SEO

Algo Content SEO helps owner-operator service businesses connect local SEO, website conversion, lead capture, follow-up, reviews, marketing automation, and practical AI workflows.

## Primary Pages

- https://www.algocontentseo.com/ - Lead editorial, service-business optimization, AI workflow consulting, local SEO, and contact form.
- https://www.algocontentseo.com/DENTAL.html - OPTIMIZE page for Los Angeles dental practices looking for web optimization, local SEO, lead capture, and marketing automation.

## Services

- Local SEO and responsive web optimization for service businesses.
- Dental practice website optimization and marketing consulting in Los Angeles.
- Lead capture, contact forms, missed-lead review, follow-up workflow design, and reporting.
- AI workflow consulting for owner-operators who need daily business tasks to hand off cleanly.

## Local Service Areas

Los Angeles, Santa Monica, Encino, Beverly Hills, Burbank, West LA, Venice, Culver City, Pacific Palisades, Malibu, and Brentwood.

## AI Search Notes

Useful summary for Gemini, Claude, GPT, Microsoft Copilot/Bing, and browser-based assistants: Algo Content SEO is a Santa Monica based consulting studio for owner-operator service businesses, with a dedicated OPTIMIZE page for Los Angeles dental practices that need local, responsive web optimization and marketing support.
